name: Hugging Face
philosophy: Hugging Face's web presence is the open-source AI community's home — yellow hug emoji as the brand mark, a clean white canvas, model card listings as the dominant content unit, and a developer-documentation aesthetic. The atmosphere is open-community AI: welcoming to researchers, model authors, and developers, with a tone that reads as 'GitHub for ML' rather than enterprise SaaS.

design_language.motion_signature: Functional minimal motion — 150ms hover on links and buttons, slight card lift on hover (1.01 scale). Model card 'like' button has a satisfying scale-tick on click. No spring elsewhere.

trademark_signals: Hugging Face yellow (#ff9d00) — the brand voltage, scarce on individual elements
Hugging face emoji as the brand mark — playful, community-welcoming
Model card listing as the dominant content unit — author, model name, downloads, likes, tags
Developer-documentation aesthetic — code snippets, sidebar TOCs, version pickers
Open-source community chrome — 'Sign in with GitHub' as primary auth
ai_slop_avoided: Don't replace the hugging face emoji with a stylized abstract mark — it is the brand voice
Don't sanitize the community chrome ('Sign in with GitHub' is intentional)
Don't tint the yellow voltage — the specific #ff9d00 is brand
Don't strip the developer-doc aesthetic — Hugging Face reads as docs-first
